hooks.command: bash -c 'cd "$PROJECT_DIR" && if [ -f node_modules/.bin/tsc ]; then OUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "Ralph VERIFY FAILED — TypeScript errors. Fix before finishing:" >&2; echo "$OUT" | head -30 >&2; exit 2; fi; fi'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -z "$FILE" ] || ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(tsx?|jsx?)$"; then exit 0; fi; cd "$PROJECT_DIR"; if [ -x node_modules/.bin/prettier ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'cd "$PROJECT_DIR"; echo "=== TIMELENS SESSION CONTEXT ==="; if [ -f PROGRESS.md ]; then cat PROGRESS.md; fi; echo "--- GIT ---"; git status --short 2>/dev/null; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null; echo "=== END ==="'
